name: PAR365
about: PAR365 is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Roseville, Minnesota, offering year-round golf regardless of weather conditions. The facility provides state-of-the-art golf simulation technology, precise data analysis, and expert coaching. Patrons can book simulator bays by the hour, participate in golf leagues, or enjoy food and drinks in a social atmosphere similar to TopGolf. The venue is equipped with interactive simulators that take players to world-class courses and other exciting venues.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access to golf regardless of Minnesota weather
Advanced ball tracking and swing analysis technology
Professional instruction tailored to individual skill levels
Social atmosphere with leagues and nightly drink specials
Variety of simulator games and world-class courses

food_and_drink.notes: Hand-crafted eats including items like dry rub wings, with a downloadable menu available
Full bar with hand-crafted cocktails, happy hour specials, and NA options available

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify, but as a golf simulator venue, it's likely they provide club rentals or you can bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has an in-house bar and kitchen serving hand-crafted cocktails and food items. They also offer exclusive food and drink deals for league members.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the exact time for 18 holes, but it mentions booking bays by the hour with rates starting at $36.50-$45/hour.

faq.question: Is PAR365 kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website mentions they welcome people of all backgrounds and skill levels, but doesn't specifically mention kid-friendly features or age restrictions.
